formDescription: This section identifies if additional permits or authorizations are required for activities related to the project, such as timber cutting, open burning, supplying potable water, affecting fish/wildlife habitat, mineral exploration, or using forest/public roads.

Answer_TimberCrownLand.title: Are you planning to cut timber on Crown Land?
Answer_TimberCrownLand.description: Cutting timber on Crown land may require an Occupant Licence to Cut from the relevant forest district.

Answer_OpenFire.title: Are you planning to use an open fire to burn timber or other materials?
Answer_OpenFire.description: Open burning responsibilities are managed by the Wildfire Management Branch; Category 3 fires require a registration number.

Answer_PotableWater.title: Are you supplying potable water to consumers?
Answer_PotableWater.description: Supplying potable water involves responsibilities under the Drinking Water Protection Act, including disinfection and emergency planning.

Answer_FishWildlifeHabitat.title: Will fish or wildlife habitat be affected?
Answer_FishWildlifeHabitat.description: Impacts on habitat are managed by the Ecosystems Section of the Ministry of Forests, Lands and Natural Resource Operations.

Answer_MineralExploration.title: Are you planning to undertake mineral exploration?
Answer_MineralExploration.description: Mineral exploration may require a separate Notice of Work application.

Answer_RoadToDam.title: Do you need to construct a road to the dam (if there are no existing roads)?
Answer_RoadToDam.description: Building a road on Crown land requires authorization under the Land Act.

Answer_WorksInForest.title: Do you want to construct works within an existing forest road right-of-way on Crown land?
Answer_WorksInForest.description: Requires a Works Permit or a Maintenance Agreement with existing permit holders.

Answer_TransportEquipment.title: Do you want to transport heavy equipment or materials on an existing forest road?
Answer_TransportEquipment.description: Requires a Road Use Permit or a Maintenance Agreement with existing permit holders.

Answer_WaterForLivestock.title: Do you want to use the water for livestock watering on Crown land?
Answer_WaterForLivestock.description: May require a Grazing Permit for livestock on Crown Land.

Answer_PublicRoadAllowance.title: Does any work occur within the public road allowance or has to cross a public road?
Answer_PublicRoadAllowance.description: Work within public road allowances may require additional approvals from relevant agencies.
